channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [动画][剧场版][开播] Anime News Network Fantasia Intl Film Fest Screens Premieres Cherry Virgin Film, Sekiro: No Defeat 动画, More
item.description: Also: live-action WIND BREAKER film, The Origin of Ultraman documentary ― The 30th annual Fantasia International Film Festival announced on Thursday that it will screen the world premiere of the... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Fantasia Int'l Film Fest Screens Premieres for Cherry and Virgin Film, Sekiro: No Defeat Anime, More

item.title: [续作] Anime News Network Animated Devil May Cry Show Gets 3rd, Final 季度
item.description: 2nd season premiered on May 12 ― Netflix announced on Thursday that the animated series of Capcom's Devil May Cry video game franchise is getting a third and final season. Showrunner Adi Shankar... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Animated Devil May Cry Show Gets 3rd, Final Season

Ltd.... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Magilumiere Magical Girls Inc. Season 2 Casts Kōsuke Gotō, Taketora

item.title: [剧场版] MyAnimeList Paradox Live 动画 Gets Movie
item.description: The Paradox Live Dope Show 2026 event announced an anime movie for the franchise on Sunday. The movie will be produced by Studio Graph77, featuring 29 characters from 9 teams, including those who... | 来源: MAL | 原文: 'Paradox Live The Animation' Gets Movie
